vocabulary.definition_tw: 方法；處理；接近
vocabulary.example: A structured approach can help students improve their English more efficiently.

vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 常用於說明解決問題或學習的方法。

vocabulary.example: Let me introduce myself and explain my study goals.

grammar_focus.title: Using 'Although..., S + V' for Contrast
grammar_focus.explanation_tw: 用 Although 引導相反事實，主句放重點，適合學術討論。
grammar_focus.example_basic: Although I am busy, I study English every day.
grammar_focus.example_advanced: Although the schedule is demanding, I can still allocate twenty minutes to focused review.

reading.title: Building Effective Study Habits
reading.text: Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time. To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review. Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'motivation strategy', 'element and examples', 'disadvantage in context', and 'economy for writing', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely. One effective method is to combine short reading passages with daily speaking practice. This routine does not require hours of study, but it does require consistency and clear priorities. Learners who review new material regularly often retain information better than those who cram once a week. Teachers frequently point out that active practice is more valuable than passive review. With useful phrases like 'emphasis for speaking', 'mechanism for writing', and 'domestic approach', students can make stronger connections across reading, listening, speaking, and writing. In addition, learners should record short answers to build fluency and receive feedback from teachers or language partners. A well-designed routine makes it easier to maintain motivation when work and family responsibilities compete for attention. Over several weeks, small actions can produce noticeable improvement in confidence and accuracy on both TOEFL and IELTS tasks.
reading.translation_tw: 許多成年學習者在準備國際考試時面臨共同挑戰：時間有限。為此，他們需要一個適合忙碌行程的實用方法。一種有效方法是結合短篇閱讀與每日口說練習。這個過程不需要長時間學習，但需要持續性。經常複習新材料的學習者往往比每週死背一次的人更能保留資訊。教師常強調主動練習比被動複習更有價值。有了清楚策略與務實目標，學生能在四項技能上穩定進步。幾週下來，小行動能帶來自信與準確度的顯著提升。

listening_speaking.sentence: Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

listening_speaking.sentence: To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

listening_speaking.sentence: Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'motivation strategy', 'element and examples', 'disadvantage in context', and 'economy for writing', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

toefl_skill_drill.instruction_tw: 請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。
toefl_skill_drill.prompt: Do you agree that daily short practice is better than weekly long sessions?
toefl_skill_drill.response_framework: I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.
toefl_skill_drill.sample_answer: I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds motivation strategy over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

daily_quiz.question: Which definition best matches 'motivation strategy'?
options: A. 與「動機」相關的常用片語
C. 與「缺點」相關的常用片語
D. 與「經濟」相關的常用片語
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 今日單字 motivation strategy 的解釋為「與「動機」相關的常用片語」。

daily_quiz.question: What is the main idea of today's reading?
options: A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

daily_quiz.question: Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?
options: A. I like English. Because it is useful.
B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
D. English hard but I try.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

gmail_email.subject: Day 4 英文學習｜Technology in Modern Life
gmail_email.html_body:
Day 4 英文學習

今日主題：Technology in Modern Life

階段：Foundation · 程度：B1+ · 預估：19 分鐘

今日訓練：Writing - academic discussion response

今日單字

單字音標解釋狀態
motivation strategy與「動機」相關的常用片語新詞
element and examples與「元素；要素」相關的常用片語新詞
disadvantage in context與「缺點」相關的常用片語新詞
economy for writing與「經濟」相關的常用片語新詞
emphasis for speaking與「強調」相關的常用片語新詞
mechanism for writing與「機制」相關的常用片語新詞
domestic approach與「國內的；家庭的」相關的常用片語新詞
gradual in academic writing與「逐漸的」相關的常用片語新詞
key authority與「權威；權力」相關的常用片語新詞
academic core與「核心」相關的常用片語新詞
insight development與「洞察」相關的常用片語新詞
authority in context與「權威；權力」相關的常用片語新詞
conduct effectively與「進行；行為」相關的常用片語新詞
academic economy與「經濟」相關的常用片語新詞
academic disadvantage與「缺點」相關的常用片語新詞
flexible/ˈfleksəbl/有彈性的；靈活的複習
approach/əˈproʊtʃ/方法；處理；接近複習
introduce/ˌɪntrəˈduːs/介紹；引進複習
fluency/ˈfluːənsi/流暢度；流利複習
key labor與「勞動；勞工」相關的常用片語複習

文法重點

Using 'Although..., S + V' for Contrast

用 Although 引導相反事實，主句放重點，適合學術討論。

Although S + V, S + V.

Although the schedule is demanding, I can still allocate twenty minutes to focused review.

閱讀：Building Effective Study Habits

Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time. To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review. Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'motivation strategy', 'element and examples', 'disadvantage in context', and 'economy for writing', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely. One effective method is to combine short reading passages with daily speaking practice. This routine does not require hours of study, but it does require consistency and clear priorities. Learners who review new material regularly often retain information better than those who cram once a week. Teachers frequently point out that active practice is more valuable than passive review. With useful phrases like 'emphasis for speaking', 'mechanism for writing', and 'domestic approach', students can make stronger connections across reading, listening, speaking, and writing. In addition, learners should record short answers to build fluency and receive feedback from teachers or language partners. A well-designed routine makes it easier to maintain motivation when work and family responsibilities compete for attention. Over several weeks, small actions can produce noticeable improvement in confidence and accuracy on both TOEFL and IELTS tasks.

中文翻譯：許多成年學習者在準備國際考試時面臨共同挑戰：時間有限。為此，他們需要一個適合忙碌行程的實用方法。一種有效方法是結合短篇閱讀與每日口說練習。這個過程不需要長時間學習，但需要持續性。經常複習新材料的學習者往往比每週死背一次的人更能保留資訊。教師常強調主動練習比被動複習更有價值。有了清楚策略與務實目標，學生能在四項技能上穩定進步。幾週下來，小行動能帶來自信與準確度的顯著提升。

跟讀練習（3 句）

第 1 句

Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time.

發音提示：注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。

跟讀步驟：先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

第 2 句

To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review.

發音提示：留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。

跟讀步驟：先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

第 3 句

Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'motivation strategy', 'element and examples', 'disadvantage in context', and 'economy for writing', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely.

發音提示：句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。

跟讀步驟：分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

TOEFL 技能訓練

請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。

題目：Do you agree that daily short practice is better than weekly long sessions?

架構：I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.

範例：I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds motivation strategy over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

每日測驗（含答案）

Q1. Which definition best matches 'motivation strategy'?

  • A. 與「動機」相關的常用片語
  • B. 與「元素
  • C. 與「缺點」相關的常用片語
  • D. 與「經濟」相關的常用片語

答案：A — 今日單字 motivation strategy 的解釋為「與「動機」相關的常用片語」。

Q2. What is the main idea of today's reading?

  • A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
  • B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
  • C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
  • D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.

答案：A — 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

Q3. Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?

  • A. I like English. Because it is useful.
  • B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
  • C. Practice good and fun.
  • D. English hard but I try.

答案：B — 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

祝學習順利！明日 09:00 將寄送下一課。
